title: Cute Baby Triceratops Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Cute Baby Triceratops Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this easy cute baby triceratops coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Baby Triceratops was a ceratopsian dinosaur characterized by a large bony frill and three horns on its face.
Baby Triceratops lived during the Late Cretaceous period, coexisting with and being preyed upon by the Tyrannosaurus Rex.
